NEUVILLETTE_KEYWORD_SOURCEWATERDROPLET.d: Can hold up to 6. Some cards can consume [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold] to produce additional effects.
NEUVILLETTE_KEYWORD_SURGE.title: Surge
NEUVILLETTE_KEYWORD_SURGE.description: Heal HP. At the end of combat, lose that much HP (this effect can reduce HP to at most [blue]50%[/blue] of Max HP).
NEUVILLETTE_KEYWORD_SUBMIT.title: Submit
NEUVILLETTE_KEYWORD_SUBMIT.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it and gain [gold]Oratrice[/gold] based on its cost (0-cost cards grant 10, each additional cost grants 10 more). When [gold]Oratrice[/gold] reaches 100, clear it and obtain a [gold]Final Judgment[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_KEYWORD_AGILITY.title: Agility
NEUVILLETTE_KEYWORD_AGILITY.description: Your next Skill card that gains Block gains additional Block.
NEUVILLETTE_KEYWORD_MELUSINESTICKER.desc: A type of Skill card that costs 0 and has [gold]Retain[/gold] and [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
